TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kuku'_nu_cilal-sakatulu_a_lukyaw, title = kuku'_nu_cilal-sakatulu_a_lukyaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kuku'_nu_cilal-sakatulu_a_lukyaw} }

S.FORM: kuku' nu cilal-sakatulu a lukyaw sakacacay: sayaway tusa a telilic sakatusa: masuma sepat a telilic sakatulu: amasakimulu malecak tu cilal, amisanga tu kuku' nu cilal sakasepat: mamin tu kuku' nu cilal masuma tusa a telilic
S.PHON: kuku Ē~ ° nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ-sakatur~…ĺu a r~…ĺukjaw saka ¶a ¶aj: sajawaj tusa a t…ôr~…ĺir~…ĺi ¶ sakatusa: masuma s…ôpat a t…ôr~…ĺir~…ĺi ¶ sakatur~…ĺu: amasakimur~…ĺu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ak tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, amisaŇča tu kuku Ē~ ° nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ sakas…ôpat: mamin tu kuku Ē~ ° nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ masuma tusa a t…ôr~…ĺir~…ĺi ¶
